name: Heavy Cavalry of the Indestructible Insects
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>虫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ムシ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Heavy Cavalry of the Immortal Insect Corps
desc:
1 Level 5 or higher Insect monster + 1 Insect monster
Cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. If all face-up monsters you control are Insect monsters (Quick Effect): You can target 2 monsters on the field, including an Insect monster you control; banish them. You can only use this effect of "Heavy Cavalry of the Indestructible Insects" once per turn.
